## XBus.on() method

Retrieves the observable for an event.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
on<Event extends XEvent>(event: Event, withMetadata: true): Observable<WirePayload<XEventPayload<Event>>>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | Event | The event to retrieve an observable for. |
|  withMetadata | true | When set to <code>true</code>, the returned observable payload will be a [WirePayload](./x-components.wirepayload.md)<!-- -->. |

<b>Returns:</b>

Observable&lt;[WirePayload](./x-components.wirepayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;[XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt;&gt;&gt;

An Observable of [WirePayload](./x-components.wirepayload.md) object containing the event payload and the event metadata.
